welcome.title: Document your IBD in seconds a day
welcome.subtitle: Snap your meal — the AI spots the triggers. Nothing is ever required.

diagnosis.title: What is your diagnosis?
diagnosis.subtitle: This tailors the scores and the app's tone.

year.title: Which year?
year.subtitle: Year of your diagnosis — an estimate is fine.

state.title: Where are you today?
state.subtitle: We pre-set the tone and your streak protection.

stools.title: How many stools per day, usually?
stools.subtitle: Your personal normal — never a target.

symptoms.title: What bothers you most?
symptoms.subtitle: Pick as many as you like.

treatment.title: Your current treatment?
treatment.subtitle: Pick as many as you like.

proof.title: Documenting changes your appointments
proof.body: Patients who log their symptoms come better prepared and get more effective follow-up.

goals.title: Your goals?
goals.subtitle: Pick as many as you like.

obstacles.title: What holds you back?
obstacles.subtitle: We'll adapt our reminders — gently.
obstacles.doctor: My GI doesn't look at it

attribution.title: How did you hear about us?
attribution.subtitle: It helps us — no pressure.

notifications.title: Helpful reminders, never nagging
notifications.body: A gentle evening nudge if your day is empty, plus your Sunday recap. Two per day at most — all adjustable.

health.title: Apple Health & Google Fit
health.body: Soon: sync your activity and sleep. The connection is coming in a future version.

plan.title: Your plan is ready
plan.subtitle: Editable anytime.
plan.baselineUnknown: To establish with your first days
